prompt: Create a retro vintage, grainy but bright cinematic portrait of a young Pakistani woman standing indoors beside a white marble vanity in a softly lit dressing room. She has a deliberately featureless softly blurred face, long dark brown hair styled in a thick side braid over one shoulder, and the braid is decorated with exactly 8 tiny pastel flowers: 3 white blossoms, 2 pale pink blossoms, 2 cream blossoms, and 1 small yellow blossom. Dress her in a beautifully tailored modest summer dress in warm ivory cream, with a square neckline, fitted bodice, long sleeves, a cinched waist, and a full flowing skirt; the fabric has an all-over small delicate floral print and subtle pleated gathers at the waist. Pose her with one hand resting on the marble counter and the other lightly bent near her waist, elegant and calm, looking toward the camera. On the left side of the vanity place exactly 3 perfume bottles on an ornate gold tray: 1 square amber bottle, 1 small clear bottle, and 1 round pink bottle. Background: large mirror, softly blurred dressing-room reflections, beige textured wall on the right, warm sunlight and gentle shadows. Style: high-resolution fashion editorial photography, nostalgic film grain, muted warm tones, shallow depth of field, natural soft light, elegant modest Pakistani Islamic summer fashion, no text, no watermark.
